title: Material and Texture Import Support for Mesh Pipeline
description: Add material import support (MTL/Assimp materials) to the mesh pipeline so models can render with authored albedo/specular/normal textures instead of fallback debug textures. This ticket explicitly follows the current geometry-first implementation and can be delivered after core model loading/rendering is stable.
definition-of-done: 1. Mesh loader extracts per-mesh material references from Assimp scene. 2. Texture assets referenced by materials are resolved via `IXDAR_ASSET_REPO_ROOT`. 3. Runtime supports at least albedo texture sampling with graceful fallback when missing. 4. Material state is separated from mesh geometry state. 5. Missing/invalid material assets produce clear logs without crashing render loop. 6. Model test scene can toggle between fallback color and imported material textures.
testing-plan: 1. Load an OBJ+MTL model with texture maps and verify textured output. 2. Load same model with missing texture file and verify fallback render + warning log. 3. Validate multiple meshes with different materials in one scene. 4. Regression test model rendering path for geometry-only models still works.
todos: Map Assimp material indices to mesh sections
Resolve material texture file paths from asset repo root
Load and bind albedo textures in mesh shader pass
Add fallback behavior for missing texture/material channels
Add a sample textured model validation case in model-load scene
unknowns: Which texture channels to prioritize beyond albedo (specular/normal/roughness)
How to handle path conventions across OBJ/MTL exporters
Whether to add material caching and deduplication in initial implementation
